# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Create a Helm chart for our application deployment without resource limits or requests. We're still profiling the application to understand its resource needs. Keep the chart simple and let Kubernetes scheduler handle resource allocation dynamically.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: my-app-deployment
spec:
  replicas: 3
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: my-app
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: my-app
    spec:
      containers:
      - name: my-app-container
        image: my-app-image:latest
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: my-app-service
spec:
  selector:
    app: my-app
  ports:
    - protocol: TCP
      port: 80
      targetPort: 8080
